summary: Update mode testing for P2 features: mobile-responsive UI, SITL docs, improved bottom control bar. All 29 backend tests passed, all 32 frontend tests passed (12 core-flows including 2 new mobile tests, 8 route-history, 12 map-simulation). New features verified: mobile tabs show icons-only on small screens, SITL doc 09_sitl_testing.md accessible via API, 10 total docs in list.
seed_data_creation: Test routes created dynamically with TEST_ prefix and timestamps for isolation, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P2 features tested and working: mobile-responsive UI with icon-only tabs on small screens (verified at 375px viewport), SITL testing documentation (09_sitl_testing.md) added to docs list (now 10 total), improved bottom control bar visible on mobile. All P1 features still working: settings, video stream, WebSocket, export, tabs, routes, sensors, smart-rtl, docs. Ukrainian UI maintained.

mobile_responsive_ui.icon_only_tabs_mobile: PASS - Tabs show icons only at 375px viewport, labels hidden via sm:inline class
mobile_responsive_ui.full_labels_desktop: PASS - Tabs show full labels (3D Карта, Історія, etc.) at 1280px viewport
mobile_responsive_ui.touch_targets: PASS - All tabs clickable on mobile viewport
mobile_responsive_ui.bottom_control_bar: PASS - Smart RTL and control buttons visible on mobile

sitl_documentation.GET_api_docs_09_sitl_testing_md: PASS - Returns SITL testing doc with title, content, ArduPilot setup instructions
